ge. [[Attach:RPC_Serial_LPC1768.bin|Most Recent Image]] # Plug mbed into Linux, Mac, or Windows computer with provided USB Mini-B cable # The mbed should show up on the computer as a standard USB drive # Drag the image linked above to the mbed USB dr

e # Drag the image linked above to the mbed USB drive folder # Wait until the status light stops blinking rapidly # Press the reset button on the mbed. The second blue light should start blinking at ~1Hz Restore Edit - History - Print - Recent Change
